data.body: Delete src/app/api/openrouter/models/route.ts and src/app/api/openrouter/validate/route.ts. In src/app/api/settings/route.ts: remove maskApiKey import, openrouter field masking, PATCH API key guard. In src/lib/settings-api.ts: remove OpenRouter-related functions.
data.title: Remove OpenRouter API routes and settings-api
